examples: She has courageously continued to lead a fulfilled life.
Four months later, Pania reluctantly but courageously decided to try to educate the public and to fight for laws to ban drivers from using cell phones while a car is moving.
If you want to develop courage, then simply act courageously when it's called for.
Both doctors courageously shared their most profound vulnerabilities and personal challenges in treating patients.
Before he headed off to surgery, he courageously urged his teammates to finish the job.
